title: kube: honor `--build=false` if specified.
body:
`podman play kube` tries to build images even if `--build` is set to
false so lets honor that and make `--build` , `true` by default so it
matches the original behavior.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13285

comments.body:

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [flouthoc] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I think the problem with this is that the image is build every time. The current behaviour is build when image not exists now it will build every time. I don't think this is a good user experience.
